prompt: Create a bright youth-travel lifestyle photo with playful sticker overlays. The scene is a sunny outdoor cafe street under leafy green trees, shot in natural daylight with soft bokeh and a candid wide-angle travel-photography feel. Center the subject: a young woman traveler with dark brown shoulder-length hair, wearing a casual white short-sleeve T-shirt and light beige pants, carrying a large beige hiking backpack with straps and buckles, holding a small black camera at her side. Her face should be softly blurred or obscured for privacy. She stands turned slightly sideways in front of a white cafe storefront with outdoor tables, chairs, a coffee signboard, and warm summery greenery. Add hand-drawn doodle stickers in a cheerful scrapbook style, with thick white outlines, pastel colors, and marker/chalk texture. Include exactly 15 sticker elements: 1 large blue paint-stroke label in the upper left with yellow bubble lettering reading Sunshine Day; 2 small pink hearts near the title; 3 handwritten word stickers reading Nice!, Let’s go!, and Chill; 4 tiny handwritten phrases reading "happy" above the subject, "Enjoy every moment" near the cafe tables, plus two small motion/emphasis marks near the subject; 5 decorative icons: a pink camera icon above the subject, a white wavy outline surrounding the woman, a white cloud doodle at lower left, a pink brush stroke at bottom left, and a pink heart-shaped shell icon at bottom right. Keep the stickers integrated with the photo but clearly graphic, cute, youthful, optimistic, and energetic. Use a 16:9 horizontal canvas, high-resolution realistic photo background, shallow depth of field, sun-dappled highlights, no watermark, no extra text beyond the specified sticker words.
